message:
feat(fleet): implement transfer bundle system for cross-host prior/signature sharing

Add TransferBundle system for exporting and importing learned priors and
detection signatures across fleet hosts. Enables knowledge transfer so
newly provisioned nodes start with informed beliefs rather than flat priors.

Core capabilities:
- TransferBundle struct with schema versioning (1.0.0) and SHA256 checksums
  for deterministic integrity validation
- Three merge strategies: Weighted (default, merges Beta hyperparameters),
  Replace (overwrite local), KeepLocal (reject incoming)
- BaselineStats for cross-host normalization (class distribution, CPU utilization)
  to account for workload differences between source and destination
- Encrypted .ptb format with passphrase-based protection for secure transfer
- Conflict resolution with dry-run diff preview before committing imports
- BTreeMap-based class distributions for stable, reproducible checksums

Closes process_triage-hc7.3 (fleet learning transfer).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
